news.headline: Global Atomic reported operating & financial results for 2024, with Dasa Project progressing towards 2026 production start-up. US$375.6M estimated capital costs, increasing to US$392.8M. Spot Uranium prices ranged from $65 to $120/pound U3O8 in 2024. Turkish JV showed improved financials, cash balance of $4.4M at year-end. Dasa Project achievements include reaching new uranium deposits & advancing plant construction. Management in talks for debt financing with a U.S. Development Bank. Company raised $20M in private placement in July 2024 and closed a $40.25M public offering in October 2024. Ending cash balance as of December 31, 2024, was $18.7M. President and CEO disclosed plans for flexible spending until securing financing. Projecting readying production in H1 2026. Global Atomic retained efforts for local engagement and government support in Niger.@Service.
news.summary: Global Atomic Corporation reported its operating and financial results for 2024, focusing on the Dasa Uranium Project's progress. The project is slated for a Q1 2026 production startup, with Dasa offering significant employment and social benefits in the Niger region. The company is seeking financing through a U.S. Development Bank and potential joint venture partnerships, with capital costs estimated at $392.8 million. Uranium prices fluctuated in 2024, with spot prices ranging from $65 to $120 per pound U3O8. Additionally, the Turkish Zinc Joint-Venture saw profitability in 2025. The Company's cash balance stood at $18.7 million as of December 31, 2024.

news.headline: Rocket Lab's Neutron rocket chosen by US Space Force for $5.6 billion NSSL program, competing in Phase 3 Lane 1.
news.summary: Rocket Lab USA, Inc. has been chosen by the U.S. Space Force to vie for the Department of Defense’s crucial national security missions under the National Security Space Launch Phase 3 Lane 1 program. This selection allows Rocket Lab to compete in a firm-fixed price, indefinite delivery/indefinite-quantity contract spanning five years, with an ordering period through to. Rocket Lab, a leading company in launch services and space systems, operates under the Nasdaq symbol RKLB.

news.headline: Investors in Fluence Energy (NASDAQ: FLNC) have until May 12, 2025, to join a securities class action lawsuit.
news.summary: A securities class action lawsuit has been initiated by Berger Montague PC against Fluence Energy, Inc. ("Fluence" or the "Company") (NASDAQ: FLNC) on behalf of investors who acquired Fluence securities from November 29, 2023, through an unspecified date in 2025, impacting a significant number of investors. The lawsuit alleges certain violations by Fluence during the stated period, urging affected investors to take necessary steps in the legal process.

news.headline: Empire Petroleum reports Q4-2024 net production of 2,356 Boe/d, with assets in multiple states. Year-end 2024 proved reserves disclosed.
news.summary: Empire Petroleum, a leading oil and gas company listed on NYSE American (EP), disclosed its operational and financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year 2024. The company, which has production assets spread across New Mexico, North Dakota, Montana, Texas, and Louisiana, reported significant achievements. In the fourth quarter of 2024, Empire achieved net production volumes of 2,356 barrels of oil equivalent per day (Boe/d), with 1,581 barrels of oil included. These figures demonstrate the company's robust production capabilities and highlight a strong finish to the year. Additionally, Empire disclosed its year-end 2024 proved reserves, solidifying its position in the market.

news.summary: On March 27, 2025, healthcare company Nutex Health Inc. news.headline: VitalHub's 2024 results show significant growth: ARR up 59% to $71.1M, Revenue up 51% to $20.6M, Adjusted EBITDA up 27% to $5.0M.
news.summary: The company's Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR) experienced a significant annual increase of 59%, reaching $71.1 million. Total Revenue also saw a notable uptick, rising by 51% year over year to $20.6 million. Additionally, the Adjusted EBITDA surged by 27% year over year to reach $5.0 million.

FlexGen introduces new State of Health feature in HybridOS to monitor battery degradation, enhancing efficiency.
news.summary: FlexGen, a company based in Durham, North Carolina, has introduced a new update to their HybridOS software. This update includes an improved State of Health feature, providing customers with a more transparent and dependable insight into battery degradation. This enhancement aims to offer users crucial information on the condition of their batteries, ensuring better decision-making regarding their energy storage systems. This development by FlexGen highlights their commitment to delivering advanced solutions to their customers.

Crypto currently resembles the Internet's 'AOL era', says Sandeep Nailwal. 10-15 years needed for full glory. Only 4% worldwide own BTC.
news.summary: Polygon co-founder Sandeep Nailwal compared the current state of crypto to the early days of the internet's AOL era in the late 1990s, highlighting clunky user experiences and limited use cases. Nailwal outlined key areas for improvement, including fiat on- and off-ramps, custody solutions, and hardware wallets on mobile devices. He predicted it would take at least another 10-15 years for crypto to reach its full potential. The internet took 30-40 years to achieve mass adoption, starting with limited use cases. Today, financial use cases dominate crypto, but Nailwal believes adoption will expand to alternative sectors like social media and gaming. Only 4% of individuals globally owned Bitcoin as of February 2025, indicating mainstream adoption is still in its early stages. The industry is currently in the early adopter phase, and crypto's full potential has yet to be realized.

Dozens of military families in Key West allege fraud over toxic housing conditions at NAS.
news.summary: Court claims have been filed in Miami stating that defendants failed to disclose "dangerous, horrific" living conditions at Naval Air Station (NAS) Key West. Numerous military families were impacted by toxic privatized housing. The claims allege fraud and gross negligence, with over 50 households affected. The news was released on March 27, 2025.

news.headline: Fortuna Mining Corp files 2024 annual report on Form 40-F with SEC.NYSE: FSM | TSX: FVIVANCOUVER, March 27, 2025.
news.summary: Fortuna Mining Corp., a company based in Vancouver, British Columbia, disclosed on March 27, 2025, that it has officially submitted its fiscal 2024 annual report on Form 40-F to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission ("SEC"). The company's stocks are listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol FSM and on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol FVI. The submission of this important financial document signifies the completion of another year of operations for Fortuna Mining Corp., providing stakeholders and investors with essential information about the company's performance and financial health.

NASA announces SpaceX Crew-11 mission with 4 crew members from 3 space agencies to launch for long-duration science expedition to ISS.
news.summary: In the near future, as part of NASA's SpaceX Crew-11 mission, a team of four astronauts representing three different space agencies is set to embark on a long-duration science expedition to the International Space Station. This initiative involves NASA astronauts and individuals from other agencies. The mission will take place in the upcoming months, with the crew traveling aboard the orbiting laboratory to conduct various scientific experiments.

news.headline: B2Gold updates Goose Project plan, confirms C$1,540 million cash expenditure for construction and mine development.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, B2Gold Corp. (TSX: BTO, NYSE AMERICAN: BTG, NSX: B2G) has released findings from a technical report following National Instrument 43-101 guidelines for its Back River Gold District in Nunavut, Canada. Titled “Goose Project and Back River District, Nunavut, Canada, NI 43-101 Technical Report” and dated December 31, 2024, the report focuses on an updated Mineral Reserve estimate to outline a new life of mine plan for the Goose Project. All monetary values are in USD. The Back River Technical Report is scheduled for submission on SEDAR+ by March 31, 2025.

news.summary: The launch date for Off the Grid's GUNZ Avalanche L1 network has been revealed, along with the highly anticipated GUN token. Stay tuned for the latest updates on this exciting development.

news.headline: Sei Foundation considers acquiring 23andMe, plans to secure genetic data of 15M Americans on blockchain to ensure privacy and data ownership.
news.summary: The Sei foundation is considering acquiring bankrupt genetic testing company 23andMe to protect the genetic privacy of 15 million Americans by storing their data on the blockchain. The acquisition plan was announced on March 27, shortly after 23andMe filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy. The company holds genetic information from around 15 million individuals globally. Concerns over data privacy have been reignited by the bankruptcy, prompting New York and California Attorneys General to urge users to request the deletion of personal data. The Sei token rose by 3% following the announcement, increasing from $0.209 to $0.215.

Acrivon Therapeutics reported positive endometrial cancer data - 35% overall response rate (cORR) in BM+ patients, raised $180.6 million by 2024.
news.summary: Acrivon Therapeutics, a precision medicine company, announced positive data for ACR-368 in endometrial cancer patients, showing a confirmed overall response rate (cORR) of 35%, significantly higher than the last prior therapy (15%). In patients relapsed after prior therapies, cORR was 50% with median response duration >10 months, while refractory patients had a cORR of 33% with median response duration ~3.4 months. The company reported cash runway till 2027. ACR-2316 trial enrollment ahead of schedule with tumor shrinkage observed at higher doses. ACR-368 showed promising results with high cORR and disease control rates. Acrivon emphasized its AP3 platform's capabilities for drug discovery and design. Update on ACR-368 and ACR-2316 trials, financial results, and future milestones were also provided. Acrivon focuses on endometrial cancer, deprioritizing ovarian and bladder cancer programs due to competition and enrollment challenges.

news.headline: Judge orders Trump agencies to preserve recent Signal chats. Signal leak prompts action.
news.summary: In recent reports, it has been stated that there has been a significant increase in the unemployment rate, rising by more than 2% in the last quarter. This shift has resulted in a total of over 2 million individuals currently seeking employment opportunities. The rise in unemployment has also impacted various sectors, with the manufacturing industry seeing a notable decrease in job availability. Additionally, the government has announced measures to address this issue, including plans to invest over $5 million in job creation programs. Experts predict that it may take several months for the economy to stabilize and for the unemployment rate to decrease.

Trump calls for Fed to cut rates, currently at 4.25%-4.50%. Uncertainty looms, but 3 ETFs identified to flourish. Ultra-Short Vanguard ETF (VGUS) offers a hedge against interest rate volatility.
news.summary: President Donald Trump is pushing the Federal Reserve to lower interest rates as he introduces new tariffs, adding to economic uncertainty. The Fed opted to maintain rates at 4.25%-4.50%, expressing concerns over rising inflation and slowing growth. The decision signals a shift towards a more lenient policy stance on quantitative tightening, leading to revisions in growth forecasts and inflation expectations. Amidst this, three ETFs have been identified as potential beneficiaries of stable or decreasing interest rates.One such ETF is the Vanguard Ultra-Short Treasury ETF (NASDAQ: VGUS), which serves as a hedge against interest rate fluctuations. VGUS focuses on short-term Treasury debt, minimizing interest rate sensitivity. In a scenario where rates remain steady or decline, investors in VGUS could see growth.

news.headline: Braze, Inc. (NASDAQ: BRZE) shares surged after Q4 results exceeded expectations. Quarterly revenue reached $160.4M, with EPS at 12 cents. Subscription revenue in the quarter rose to $153.9M.
news.summary: Braze, Inc. (NASDAQ:BRZE) shared its Q4 financial results after Thursday's market close. The company reported earnings of 12 cents per share, surpassing the estimated five cents. Total quarterly revenue stood at $160.4 million, exceeding the expected $155.72 million.In terms of revenue breakdown, subscription revenue for the quarter reached $153.9 million, showing growth from $125.9 million in the same quarter of the previous fiscal year. Meanwhile, professional services and other revenue were reported at $6.5 million, up from $5.1 million in the Q4 of the previous fiscal year. Further details on the performance can be found on Benzinga.com.
